title: Gateway plugin auth bypass via encoded dot-segment traversal
description: The gateway security path canonicalization logic in security-path.ts uses a MAX_PATH_DECODE_PASSES limit of 3 to decode percent-encoded URL paths before checking them against protected route prefixes. An attacker can bypass protected plugin route authentication by encoding the path with more than 3 levels of percent-encoding (e.g., quadruple-encoding slashes), causing the canonicalization to stop before reaching the fully decoded form that would match the protected prefix /api/channels/. Additionally, the function does not detect or fail closed when the decode pass limit is reached while the path is still changing.
